question: Chapters
feedback: The text lists the main sections of the thesis: ievads (introduction), trīs nodaļas (three chapters), and secinājumi (conclusions). However, it does not explicitly name the titles of the three chapters.

question: Description
feedback: The text briefly describes the contents of each section. It mentions what will be covered in each chapter and the conclusions. However, the descriptions are very concise and could benefit from more detail to give a clearer picture of what each section will entail.

question: Structure
feedback: The general structure of the thesis can be understood from this text. It is clear that the thesis will have an introduction, three main chapters, and conclusions. However, for better clarity, it would be helpful to include the titles of the three chapters.
